creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Following ports are false positives and are not related to Python 3.8:

- comms/py-lirc (was already set to expired and is gone now)
- mail/py-django-mailbox (issues with the makefile, fixed)
- www/py-django-advanced-filters (issues with the makefile, fixed)

The remaining ports (including biology/py-crossmap and math/sage) should be fixed so another exp-run could be started.

(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #61)

Thanks for your pointer, this will be taken into account once the exp-run is ok.
